actionable_feedback: Add a Sensitivity sheet with low/best/high area-loss cases and a clear worst_case selector/flag; reference this flag in the Scenario calculations.
Implement an explicit bellows_limit_check cell (compare measured_backpressure vs 3.0 barg) that auto-triggers scenario Fail and Restart No-Go if exceeded.
Make Pass/Fail and overall Restart decision fully formula-driven (no manual overrides) and visibly summarized on a Summary sheet.

In the HAZOP sheet, add columns for safeguard type (administrative vs independent), relief_fail_link (+10), independent_SIF_credit (-5), and tabulate each recommendation with cost, install duration, and expected likelihood reduction per node.

Include all four recommendations in both workbook and memo: flare_dp_alarm ($68k, 14d, L-2), PSV_clean_replace ($42k, 2d, restores area_loss=0), catalyst_barcode_interlock ($55k, 10d, L-2), temporary_batch_temp_limit_145C ($6k, immediate, required_area -3.8 cm2, throughput -22%).
Add a small memo summary table that explicitly shows the 145 C limit's effect on required areas for both runaway cases and states the -22% throughput impact.
Add author, version, date, and a ReadMe/How-to-Update section in the workbook (inputs, units, named ranges) and mirror author/version/date in the memo.
Insert quick unit/hand-check cells for the backpressure derating term and effective area; include a clamp-to-zero check.
Add conditional formatting to highlight worst-case sensitivity, any scenario Fail, and any administrative-only safeguard that blocks restart.
Ensure memo references (OSHA 1910.119, API 520/521, CCPS/DIERS) are cited concisely without reproducing proprietary text.
Regenerate and include updated renders/exports so reviewers can verify the new checks and tables visually.
artifact_specific_comments: relief_derating_hazop_priority.xlsx: Add Sensitivity sheet with worst_case flag; implement bellows_limit_check; ensure Scenario sheet references named ranges and worst_case; expand HAZOP with cost/install/L-reduction and relief_fail_link; add unit/hand-check cells; include ReadMe and metadata.

restart_safety_memo.md: Add references (OSHA 1910.119, API 520/521, CCPS/DIERS); include a table tying the 145 C limit to reduced required areas and -22% throughput; fully list recommendations with cost/install/impact; ensure all numeric claims match workbook values.
feedback_summary: Solid No-Go decision and correct application of rules. Minor but important gaps: workbook does not visibly flag worst-case sensitivity; bellows-limit auto-fail cell not shown; HAZOP recommendations not fully tabulated with cost/install/likelihood impact; memo lacks explicit summary table tying 145 C limit to reduced required area; author/version and quick-update instructions missing. One verifier note: ensure claims like 22% throughput reduction and flare DP alarm recommendation are explicitly documented and grounded in the artifacts.

extra_model_fields.notes: No rubric criteria failed; medium-priority local fixes will close gaps and address verifier's minor unsupported-detail flag.
